name: X-Golf South County
address: 4476 Lemay Ferry Rd, St. Louis, MO 63129
about: X-Golf South County is a golf simulation venue offering a high-tech indoor experience for golfers of all skill levels. The facility features multiple simulator bays equipped with advanced tracking technology to provide realistic ball and club data analysis. Pricing is based on hourly bay rentals, making it accessible for both solo practice and group outings. It is an ideal destination for those seeking to improve their game or enjoy golf in a controlled environment regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced launch monitor technology for precise shot data analysis
Year-round golfing capability unaffected by weather
Multiple bay options for individual or group sessions
Professional coaching available for skill improvement

food_and_drink.notes: On-site kitchen and food service available
Full bar service available on premises

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are required to bring their own golf equipment to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue offers its own kitchen and bar services.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A full 18-hole simulation generally takes approximately 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The facility welcomes families, though specific children's amenities or activities are not detailed on their website.
